themes.exampleQuote: I always make sure to try their new flavors because it always surprises me
never received a portion so small for $7 at several other locations
the waffle cones which they make fresh throughout the day
me and my dog's favorite spot, I always order him a small scoop of vanilla with waffle wedge
they allow you to try any flavor before you pick one out

notable_quote: All the flavors tasted fresh and have robust flavors, and they allow you to try any flavor before you pick one out.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers reliably praise the rotating flavor lineup, fresh waffle cones, and the try-before-you-buy culture, while a recurring friction point centers on portion size at this specific Bakery Square location relative to other Jeni's outposts and the price paid.
quarter_narrative: Thirty-five Pittsburgh creators filed 37-plus TikToks at Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams this quarter, pulling over 1.15 million plays while the business itself has no TikTok account of its own. The signal is landing entirely through other people's phones: @morganchompz alone drove a million plays on a spring flavor lineup post, yet Jeni's captured none of that audience directly. Over in the Pittsburgh Sweets family, Page's holds the top spot on the strength of social momentum, a gap Jeni's could close not by posting more on Instagram, where its 12 posts and four reels in 30 days are already respectable, but by planting a flag on the platform where the city is already filming it. A TikTok presence of its own, even a minimal one, would be the fastest path from second in ice cream to first in Sweets.
tldr_read: Dominant TikTok creator volume and a perfect conversion path, but no TikTok account to catch the traffic; Icons of the Burgh, #2 in Pittsburgh Ice Cream.
tldr_meaning: The creator energy is already here at scale; the rank ceiling is determined by whether the business claims a presence on the platform generating over a million plays in its name.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Second In Ice Cream, Built On 1.15 Million Plays It Doesn't Own.

playbook.headline: Open a Jeni's TikTok account now
playbook.action: Thirty-five creators posted 37-plus videos pulling 1.15 million plays this quarter; a verified account lets the business tag back, capture followers, and redirect that traffic.

playbook.headline: Address the portion narrative directly
playbook.action: Multiple reviews flag the Pittsburgh location's scoop size against other Jeni's locations; one transparent post or updated menu note on Google could neutralize a recurring two-star trigger.

playbook.headline: Expand the Google photo catalog
playbook.action: With 450 photos across six categories, the Vibe and Video buckets are thin; four to six short clips of the cone-rolling process would fill the gap and index well in local search.
